headline: MAI Capital’s Megan Miller on Why Wealth Management Is an ‘Underappreciated’ Career for Women
summary: The senior advisor says the job offers intellectual challenge, autonomy, high compensation, and the flexibility to raise a family.

headline: Charles Schwab Completes Acquisition of Forge Global
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, March 02, 2026--The Charles Schwab Corporation (Schwab) today announced that it has completed its acquisition of Forge Global Holdings, Inc. (Forge). Forge provides eligible investors with direct and indirect access to shares of pre-IPO companies through direct private share purchases, single company funds, and multicompany funds.
